# docs-code-snippets

Curated, runnable code examples extracted from the Sei EVM documentation.
Source: https://docs.sei.io/evm
Repo structure: function-based taxonomy organized by what the code does.

## Network Info

- Sei Mainnet: chain_id=1329, rpc=https://evm-rpc.sei-apis.com, explorer=https://seitrace.com
- Sei Testnet: chain_id=1328, rpc=https://evm-rpc-testnet.sei-apis.com

## Smart Contracts

### smart-contracts/getting-started
- Coin.sol — Basic Solidity coin contract with minting and transfer (from https://docs.sei.io/evm/evm-general)
- Auction.vy — Vyper open auction contract with bidding, withdrawal, and auction end logic
- Tags: solidity, vyper, beginner

### smart-contracts/erc20-token
- contracts/MyToken.sol — ERC20 token with mint, burn, pause, and ERC20Permit
- scripts/deploy.js — Hardhat deploy script for Sei
- test/MyToken.test.js — Hardhat tests
- hardhat.config.js — Hardhat config with Sei mainnet/testnet networks
- foundry/src/MyToken.sol — Foundry variant
- foundry/script/Deploy.s.sol — Foundry deploy script
- foundry/test/MyToken.t.sol — Foundry tests
- foundry/foundry.toml — Foundry config for Sei
- Tags: erc20, token, hardhat, foundry, openzeppelin, deploy
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/evm-hardhat, https://docs.sei.io/evm/evm-foundry

### smart-contracts/erc721-nft
- contracts/MyNFT.sol — ERC721 NFT with enumerable, URI storage, pausable, burnable
- scripts/deploy.js — Hardhat deploy script
- hardhat.config.js — Hardhat config for Sei
- foundry/src/MyNFT.sol — Foundry variant
- foundry/script/Deploy.s.sol — Foundry deploy script
- foundry/foundry.toml — Foundry config for Sei
- Tags: erc721, nft, hardhat, foundry, openzeppelin
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/evm-hardhat, https://docs.sei.io/evm/evm-foundry

### smart-contracts/upgradeable-uups
- contracts/MyTokenV1.sol — UUPS upgradeable ERC20 V1 (initializer)
- contracts/MyTokenV2.sol — V2 with supply cap and transfer limits (reinitializer)
- scripts/deploy.js — Deploy proxy script
- scripts/upgrade.js — Upgrade proxy to V2 script
- hardhat.config.js — Hardhat config for Sei
- Tags: uups, upgradeable, proxy, erc20, advanced
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/evm-hardhat

### smart-contracts/counter
- src/Counter.sol — Simple counter contract (increment/decrement/reset)
- test/Counter.t.sol — Foundry unit and fuzz tests using bound()
- script/Deploy.s.sol — Foundry deploy script
- foundry.toml — Foundry config for Sei
- Tags: counter, foundry, fuzz-testing, beginner
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/evm-foundry

### smart-contracts/verification
- hardhat-verify.md — Hardhat verification commands for Seitrace (mainnet + testnet)
- foundry-verify.md — Foundry forge verify-contract commands with constructor arg encoding
- Tags: verification, seitrace, hardhat, foundry
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/evm-verify-contracts

## Precompiles

### precompiles/example-usage
- setup-ethers.js — Browser and Node.js ethers.js provider/signer setup with @sei-js/evm
- staking-example.js — JS: delegate, undelegate, redelegate, query delegation
- governance-example.js — JS: vote on proposals, submit proposals
- Tags: precompile, staking, governance, ethers, javascript
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/precompiles/example-usage

### precompiles/distribution
- interfaces/IDistribution.sol — Distribution precompile interface (address: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000001007)
- YieldAggregator.sol — Harvest rewards from multiple validators
- ValidatorCommissionManager.sol — Treasury routing, commission withdrawal
- Tags: precompile, distribution, rewards, staking
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/precompiles/distribution

### precompiles/staking
- interfaces/IStaking.sol — Staking precompile interface (address: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000001005)
- StakingManager.sol — Full delegation lifecycle: delegate (18-dec wei), undelegate/redelegate (6-dec usei)
- Tags: precompile, staking, delegation, validator
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/precompiles/staking

### precompiles/governance
- interfaces/IGovernance.sol — Governance precompile interface (address: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000001006)
- GovernanceVoter.sol — yes/no/abstain/noWithVeto voting helpers, proposal submission
- Tags: precompile, governance, voting, proposals
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/precompiles/governance

### precompiles/oracle
- interfaces/IOracle.sol — Oracle precompile interface (address: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000001008)
- OraclePriceFeed.sol — Live price queries, TWAP, caching with staleness protection
- Tags: precompile, oracle, price-feed, twap, defi
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/precompiles/oracle

### precompiles/json
- interfaces/IJson.sol — JSON precompile interface (address: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000001003)
- JsonParser.sol — String/uint/array extraction, multi-key batch extraction, price data decoder
- Tags: precompile, json, parsing, cosmwasm
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/precompiles/json

### precompiles/p256
- P256Verify.sol — Low-level IP256Verify interface + constant (address: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000100)
- ECDSA.sol — Shared Signature and PublicKey structs
- P256.sol — P256.verify() library (EIP-7212 wrapper)
- P256Example.sol — Key registry, replay-safe authenticated actions, WebAuthn/Passkey helper
- Tags: precompile, p256, eip-7212, webauthn, passkey, cryptography, advanced
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/precompiles/p256-precompile

### precompiles/cosmos
- AddrPrecompile.sol — EVM ↔ bech32 address conversion
- BankPrecompile.sol — Native Cosmos token send, balance and supply queries
- CosmWasmPrecompile.sol — Execute, query, and instantiate CosmWasm contracts from EVM
- IBCPrecompile.sol — IBC transfers with height/timestamp-based timeouts
- PointerPrecompile.sol — Create and resolve ERC-20/ERC-721 ↔ CW-20/CW-721 pointers
- Tags: precompile, cosmos, bank, ibc, cosmwasm, addr, pointer, advanced
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/precompiles/addr, .../bank, .../cosmwasm, .../ibc, .../pointer

## Frontend

### frontend/connect-wallet
- src/App.tsx — Full RainbowKit + wagmi + Sei Global Wallet React app (from docs verbatim)
- src/wagmi.ts — wagmi config with sei and seiTestnet chains
- Tags: frontend, wagmi, rainbowkit, eip-6963, sei-global-wallet, beginner
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/sei-global-wallet, https://docs.sei.io/evm/building-a-frontend

### frontend/read-write-contract
- src/ContractInteraction.tsx — useReadContract, useWriteContract, useWaitForTransactionReceipt
- src/App.tsx — wagmi provider setup
- Tags: frontend, wagmi, smart-contract, read, write
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/building-a-frontend

### frontend/in-app-swaps
- src/SwapComponent.tsx — Token selector, balance display, ERC-20 approve flow, DEX integration
- Tags: frontend, swap, defi, wagmi, erc20, intermediate
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/in-app-swaps

## Wallet Integrations

### wallet-integrations/particle
- src/App.tsx — Particle Auth social login + ERC-4337 Smart Account on Sei
- src/particleConfig.ts — Particle network config (Biconomy v2 AA)
- Tags: wallet, particle, account-abstraction, erc-4337, social-login
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/wallet-integrations/particle

### wallet-integrations/pimlico
- src/pimlicoClient.ts — createPimlicoClient, toSimpleSmartAccount, createSmartAccountClient
- src/App.tsx — Pimlico bundler + paymaster, gas sponsorship, UserOperation sending
- Tags: wallet, pimlico, account-abstraction, erc-4337, gas-sponsorship
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/wallet-integrations/pimlico

### wallet-integrations/thirdweb-4337
- src/client.ts — Thirdweb client init (from docs verbatim)
- src/App.tsx — smartWallet + inAppWallet, TransactionButton, readContract/prepareContractCall
- contracts/Storage.sol — Storage contract used in the example
- Tags: wallet, thirdweb, account-abstraction, erc-4337, gasless
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/wallet-integrations/thirdweb

### wallet-integrations/thirdweb-7702
- src/App.tsx — inAppWallet with executionMode EIP7702, sponsorGas: true
- Tags: wallet, thirdweb, eip-7702, gasless (EOA keeps its address unlike ERC-4337)
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/wallet-integrations/thirdweb-7702

## Bridging

### bridging/layerzero
- contracts/MyOFT.sol — LayerZero V2 OFT inheriting from OFT base; Sei mainnet EID: 30280
- hardhat.config.js — Sei mainnet/testnet/Sepolia networks for LZ deployment
- scripts/deploy.js — Deploy OFT, link peers, send cross-chain tokens
- Tags: bridging, layerzero, oft, cross-chain
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/bridging/layerzero

### bridging/thirdweb
- src/BridgeComponent.tsx — PayEmbed in bridge + buy modes targeting Sei mainnet (chain ID 1329)
- Tags: bridging, thirdweb, cross-chain (350+ chains, 20k+ tokens)
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/bridging/thirdweb

## Oracles

### oracles/chainlink
- contracts/ChainlinkConsumer.sol — AggregatorV3Interface, staleness checks, 18-dec scaling
- Tags: oracle, chainlink, price-feed, beginner
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/oracles/chainlink

### oracles/pyth
- contracts/PythPriceFeed.sol — Pull-based, VAA updates, getPriceNoOlderThan, atomic updateAndGetPrice
- scripts/updateAndRead.js — Fetch VAAs from Hermes API and push on-chain
- Tags: oracle, pyth, price-feed, pull-oracle, hermes, intermediate
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/oracles/pyth

### oracles/redstone
- contracts/RedstoneConsumer.sol — Inherits MainDemoConsumerBase; calldata-injection model
- Tags: oracle, redstone, price-feed, calldata, intermediate
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/oracles/redstone

### oracles/api3
- contracts/Api3Consumer.sol — Minimal IApi3DapiProxy interface, multi-feed, staleness check
- Tags: oracle, api3, dapi, price-feed, beginner
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/oracles/api3

## VRF

### vrf/pyth
- contracts/SeiEntropyDemo.sol — Complete dice game implementing IEntropyConsumer (from docs verbatim)
  - playDiceGame(targetNumber) — pay fee, request randomness
  - entropyCallback(seqNum, provider, randomNumber) — resolve result and pay winner
- scripts/deploy.js — Deploy with automatic house bankroll funding
- Tags: vrf, randomness, pyth, entropy, dice-game, callback, intermediate
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/vrf/pyth-network-vrf

## Indexers

### indexers/goldsky
- subgraph/subgraph.yaml — Goldsky subgraph manifest for Sei mainnet
- subgraph/schema.graphql — Token, Transfer, Approval, AccountBalance entities
- subgraph/src/mapping.ts — AssemblyScript event handlers with balance tracking
- Tags: indexer, goldsky, subgraph, erc20, graphql
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/indexers/goldsky

### indexers/the-graph
- subgraph/subgraph.yaml — The Graph manifest (Protocol singleton, call handler, grafting)
- subgraph/schema.graphql — Schema with protocol-level stats
- subgraph/src/mapping.ts — AssemblyScript mappings with nonFatalErrors
- Tags: indexer, the-graph, subgraph, erc20, graphql
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/indexers/the-graph

### indexers/moralis
- streams/createStream.js — Moralis Streams setup on Sei chain 0x531 (ERC-20 + native TX)
- webhooks/handler.js — Express server with HMAC signature verification
- Tags: indexer, moralis, streams, webhooks, real-time, beginner
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/indexers/moralis

## AI Tooling

### ai-tooling/mcp-server
- config/mcp-config.json — MCP server config for Claude Desktop / Cursor / Continue
- Tags: ai-tooling, mcp, model-context-protocol, claude, cursor, beginner
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/ai-tooling/mcp-server

### ai-tooling/cambrian
- src/agent.ts — LangChain ReAct agent with Cambrian toolkit; interactive + demo modes
- Tags: ai-tooling, cambrian, langchain, openai, llm, intermediate
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/ai-tooling/cambrian

## Protocols

### protocols/usdc
- contracts/USDCIntegration.sol — approve/transferFrom, EIP-2612 permit, blacklist checks
- config/addresses.json — USDC mainnet: 0x3894085Ef7Ff0f0aeDf52E2A2704928d1Ec074F1
- Tags: usdc, stablecoin, circle, erc20, permit, eip2612, beginner
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/usdc

### protocols/x402
- server/payment-server.ts — Express server with 4 price tiers ($0.01–$1.00) via paymentMiddleware
- client/payment-client.ts — x402-fetch wrapper, manual 402 flow, batch client (3 approaches)
- Tags: x402, payments, http, usdc, micropayments, ai-agents, intermediate
- Docs: https://docs.sei.io/evm/x402
